#!/bin/bash
set -e
echo "======================================================================"
echo "GCHAT SYNC INITIALIZATION"
echo "======================================================================"

# Verify Chrome DevTools is accessible at required endpoint
echo "[CHECK] Verifying Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223..."
if ! curl -s --connect-timeout 5 http://192.168.1.11:9223/json/version > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "[ERROR] Cannot connect to Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223"
    echo "Please ensure Chrome is running with --remote-debugging-port=9223 and GChat is open in 3-panel view"
    exit 1
fi
echo "[OK] Chrome DevTools connection verified"

# Execute gchat.py script with live progress streaming
cd /a0/usr/skills/gchat/scripts
echo ""
echo "[START] Executing gchat.py..."
echo "[INFO] Auto-detected days for Tuesday April 14, 2026 (5 weekdays)"
echo "[NOTE] This process takes 5-15 minutes. Do not interrupt."
echo "[LOGS] Progress will be streamed below..."
echo "======================================================================"

# Run the script with combined stdout/stderr and real-time display
python3 gchat.py --output /a0/usr/workdir/gchat-output.md 2>&1 | tee /tmp/gchat-progress.log &
SCRIPT_PID=$!
wait $SCRIPT_PID
EXIT_CODE=$?

echo ""
echo "======================================================================"
echo "Script completed with return code: $EXIT_CODE"
echo "======================================================================"

# Verify output file was created
OUTPUT_FILE="/a0/usr/workdir/gchat-output.md"
if [ -f "$OUTPUT_FILE" ]; then
    FILE_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$OUTPUT_FILE")
    echo ""
    echo "[SUCCESS] Output file created at:"
    echo "  File: $OUTPUT_FILE"
    echo "  Size: $FILE_SIZE bytes"
else
    echo ""
    echo "[ERROR] Output file NOT found at $OUTPUT_FILE"
    exit 1
fi
